200# return «

User rating: item not rated yet

Fighter type: Tank

Introduced in: Special offer

 

Write a review Send to Discord

Rate this item


description 2/6

Once in a while, covers themselves with a lightning shield. The shield absorbs 33% of the physical damage taken. Each time the unit with a lightning shield takes damage, it emits a lightning bolt that deals 50000 damage to the attacker. Activates once per 8 sec or even more seldom.

description 4/6

Max health is increased by 150000. Once in a while, covers themselves with a lightning shield. The shield absorbs 38% of the physical damage taken. Each time the unit with a lightning shield takes damage, it emits a lightning bolt that deals 75000 damage to the attacker. Activates once per 8 sec or even more seldom. When the lightning shield is activated, it fills with indomitable energy. The damage done by the next 3 hits is increased by 100000, and each of the hits has a chance 75% of dealing the same amount of damage to the enemy with the lowest health. While the charge is active, the unit absorbs 70% of magic damage and restores its health by 65% of this damage.

description 6/6

Max health is increased by 250000. Once in a while, covers themselves with a lightning shield. The shield absorbs 45% of the physical damage taken. Each time the unit with a lightning shield takes damage, it emits a lightning bolt that deals 150000 damage to the attacker. Activates once per 8 sec or even more seldom. When the lightning shield is activated, it fills with indomitable energy. The damage done by the next 3 hits is increased by 150000, and each of the hits has a chance 75% of dealing the same amount of damage to the enemy with the lowest health. While the charge is active, the unit absorbs 80% of magic damage and restores its health by 80% of this damage. Attack speed is increased by 20%. On death, takes on the form of a spirit. While in a spirit form, the Storm continues fighting and he cannot be reached by enemies. However, his damage is reduced by 25% and he does not use abilities. Can only be resurrected when he takes on his material form again. As a spirit, he fights as long as there is at least one live ally left. Every 3 sec, casts a lightning bolt that deals 120000 magic damage to a random enemy and strikes all ennemies off balance. They are unable to dodge or deal critical damage for 2 sec.


Substance of Chaos

description 2/6

Damage done by the lightning shield ignores target’s armor.

description 4/6

Damage done by the lightning shield ignores target’s armor. While the unit is charged with indomitable energy, the unit’s enhanced attacks tear the enemy’s armor. When the enemy’s armor is torn, that enemy takes 150000 pure damage and has their physical armor reduced by 75% for 5 sec. Stacks up to 3 times. Also, that enemy takes 300000 physical damage over 5 sec.

description 6/6

Damage done by the lightning shield ignores target’s armor. While the unit is charged with indomitable energy, the unit’s enhanced attacks tear the enemy’s armor. When the enemy’s armor is torn, that enemy takes 150000 pure damage and has their physical armor reduced by 75% for 5 sec. Stacks up to 3 times. Also, that enemy takes 300000 physical damage over 5 sec. The spirit’s attacks ignore the enemy’s armor.


Substance of Greatness

description 2/6

The lightning shield absorbs damage of any type instead of physical damage.

description 4/6

The lightning shield absorbs damage of any type instead of physical damage. While the charge is active, the unit blocks all damage instead of only magic damage.

description 6/6

The lightning shield absorbs damage of any type instead of physical damage. While the charge is active, the unit blocks all damage instead of only magic damage. Once in a while, the spirit casts a shield on an ally. The shield absorbs 150000 physical damage for 3 sec. While the shield is active, the unit cannot be electrified.


Substance of Harmony

description 2/6

Damage to the target hit by the lightning is reduced by 33% for 5 sec.

description 4/6

Damage to the target hit by the lightning is reduced by 33% for 5 sec. While the charge is active, the unit’s attack damage is increased by 50%.

description 6/6

Damage to the target hit by the lightning is reduced by 33% for 5 sec. While the charge is active, the unit’s attack damage is increased by 50%. The Storm’s damage is increased by 100% for the duration of the battle.

Materials

Fireball
Celestial Stone

Portal chest for very dark souls
